nasb.text: Then he said to the people, “Go forward, and march around the city, and let the armed men go on before the ark of the Lord.”

esv.text: And he said to the people, “Go forward. March around the city and let the armed men pass on before the ark of the Lord.”

cnv.text: 他又對人民說：“你們前去繞城吧，拿武器的人要走在耶和華約櫃的前面。”

ccb.text: 他又对民众说：“你们要前去绕着城墙走，军队要走在耶和华的约柜前面。”
